ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regattas" (
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regatta */,
  "regatta_name" TEXT /* Name of the regatta */,
  "regatta_type" TEXT /* Type of regatta (e.g., General Handicap) */,
  "regatta_description" TEXT /* Description of the regatta */,
  "competition_format" TEXT /* Format of the regatta (e.g., Single Handed, 2 Sails) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the regatta */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regatta */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regatta */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailor_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailboat class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailboat class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the sailboat class */,
  "handicap_value" REAL /* Handicap value assigned to the sailboat class */,
  "handicap_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the handicap value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "sailor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sailor */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the sailor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailboats" (
  "sailboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailboat */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor owning the sailboat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailboat */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the sailboat */,
  "rigged_sails" TEXT /* Type of sails rigged on the sailboat */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat class */,
  "boat_description" TEXT /* Description of the sailboat */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the sailboat */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the sailboat */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the sailboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regatta_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor participating */,
  "sailboat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat participating */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the sailor entered the regatta */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regatta_participants_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regatta_participants_sailboat_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailboat_id") REFERENCES sailboats ("sailboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regatta_participants_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race within the regatta */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the participant */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the participant */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected finish time of the participant */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the participant */,
  "dns" INTEGER /* Whether the sailor did not start the race */,
  "dnf" INTEGER /* Whether the sailor did not finish the race */,
  "dsq" INTEGER /* Whether the sailor was disqualified from the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES regatta_participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the sailor */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the sailor in the regatta */,
  "score_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the sailor */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the sailor in the regatta */,
  "standing_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the standing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., OCS, DSQ) */,
  "penalty_points" INTEGER /* Points deducted for the penalty */,
  "penalty_description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the penalty was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., result update, penalty assigned) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Format of the regatta (e.g., Single Handed, 2 Sails)
